title: MD
biography: Prawase Wasi is Thailand's most distinguished physician, a hematologist who pioneered thalassemia research and prevention in Southeast Asia. He led Thailand's universal healthcare reform (30 Baht Scheme) and was instrumental in peaceful resolution of the 1992 Thai political crisis through mediation.
aiSummary: Prawase Wasi is a hematology and health policy specialist with an H-index of 45 at Mahidol University. Pioneer in thalassemia research who led Thailand's universal healthcare reform. Based in Bangkok, Thailand.
